description: A social media manager is creating a campaign to promote a flash sale.

nodes.task_description: Draft the text and select the images for the posts on different social media platforms (e.g., Instagram, Facebook).

expected_outcome.value: The content for the campaign is created.

nodes.task_description: Use a social media management tool to schedule the posts to go live at a specific time.

expected_outcome.value: The posts are scheduled for optimal timing.

nodes.task_description: Monitor the posts for comments and engagement after they go live.

expected_outcome.value: The manager can interact with customers and track the campaign's reach.
